transcription.text: Hi, this is Sarah from Greenfield Auto calling about your 2016 Nissan Rogue. Yeah, go ahead. So we found the CVT transmission is failing. Unfortunately it needs a full replacement. The cost is $4,200 for a remanufactured unit with a 3-year warranty. Are you kidding me? That's insane for a car that's only worth maybe $10,000. I understand it's a big number. We can also look at a used unit for around $2,800 but the warranty is only 90 days. This is ridiculous. I need to talk to my spouse. I'll call you back. Of course, take all the time you need.
transcription.summary:
## Call Summary

Called customer about 2016 Nissan Rogue CVT failure. Quoted $4,200 remanufactured (3-yr warranty) or $2,800 used (90-day warranty). Customer upset about cost, will discuss with spouse.
